codeReview.summary: The feature updates `tests/live_cli.rs` to use the resource-first CLI surface, skip live integration coverage when only fake/local-debug credentials are present, and tolerate mixed stdout around JSON payloads. The reviewed diff matches the feature requirements and I did not find blocking or non-blocking defects in scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `cli-worker` skill says `tests/live_cli.rs` should only be used when real credentials are available, but this feature legitimately needed changes there to make offline milestones safe under fake local-debug credentials.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md` step 5 says to only use `tests/live_cli.rs` when real creds are available, while feature `live-cli-test-gating-and-command-surface-fix` explicitly required updating `tests/live_cli.rs` for fake local-debug gating and the transcript shows the worker did so in session `ec96543c-8028-456e-ba29-9e765e982ec2`.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit `58b4cc9`, and current `tests/live_cli.rs`. The feature correctly gates live tests under fake/local-debug credentials, updates representative helpers to resource-first commands, and keeps the live test surface ready for later real OpenToggl validation.
